display_text: Tier N/A: Light Collector. Aura effect that heals allies and regenerates mana within a 200 radius while reducing enemy attack accuracy by 30% within the same area. Has a passive that destroys nearby trees within 325 radius and applies 75 penalty to your hero's stats. Provides 10 health regen, 6 mana regen, and 5% movement speed bonus. Stats: CD: 30s, Radius: 200, Tree Radius: 325, Duration: 2.5s.
